name: Steve
combos: Block pillar → up-air → up-special (kill confirm with iron)
gameplan: Mine resources behind blocks, wall the opponent out with side-B, anvil for raw kills.

moves_utility.fair: Combo extender; safe on shield with TNT.
moves_utility.side_b: Iron axe = ranged disjoint; gold = fast but weak.
moves_utility.anvil: Raw kill option from above, callouts only.
